docs.title: Initkoa Ecosystem Documentation
docs.text:
Welcome to the central documentation portal for the Initkoa ecosystem.

This site brings together the documentation for the main Initkoa projects in one place, so you can browse architecture, frameworks, products, and supporting systems from a single entry point.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
The portal currently aggregates documentation from these repositories:

  • SemantiK Architect
  • Kristal Framework
  • kOA Digital Ecosystem
  • Konnaxion
  • Orgo
  • SenTient

docs.title: Purpose
docs.text:
This documentation hub is designed to help readers:

  • understand how the ecosystem is structured
  • find project-specific documentation quickly
  • navigate shared concepts across repositories
  • access technical, functional, and strategic documentation in one place

docs.title: How to use this site
docs.text:
Start from the left navigation menu and select the project you want to explore.

A good reading path is:

  1. Review the ecosystem overview
  2. Open the project most relevant to your work
  3. Use search to jump to specific topics, components, or terms

docs.title: SemantiK Architect
docs.text: Documentation for architecture, concepts, and structural design.

docs.title: Kristal Framework
docs.text: Documentation for the framework, implementation patterns, and technical foundations.

docs.title: kOA Digital Ecosystem
docs.text: Documentation for the wider ecosystem and platform-level integration.

docs.title: Konnaxion
docs.text: Documentation related to connection, orchestration, or interaction layers.

docs.title: SenTient
docs.text: Documentation for intelligence, behavior, or decision-support components.

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
This portal is automatically built from multiple repositories using MkDocs and GitHub Pages.

Initkoa Ecosystem Documentation Portal
